claim_boundary: This is an algebraic sparse-rank and endpoint-consequence screen. It can identify the minimum number of additional power-law degrees of freedom needed to close the stated equations, but it cannot validate a varying-constant theory. Dimensional exponents are coordinate diagnostics; only dimensionless combinations and observables are interpreted physically.

microscopic_baseline.atomic_transition: Q proportional to alpha^2 m_e c^2 / h

microscopic_constraints.composite_supernova: tau - 0.5 ell = s_hat, with ell = M_Ch exponent + eta_Ni

assumptions: electron-scattering opacity kappa proportional to alpha^2 h^2/(m_e^2 c^2 m_p)
diffusion time proportional to sqrt(kappa M_Ch/(v c))
ejecta velocity v proportional to c
one optional residual duration exponent is allowed

ranking: full column rank before rank-deficient exact families
maximum endpoint change factor at z_max

external_gate_policy.atomic_clock_limits: Not converted to a hard numerical gate without a registered scalar history mapping redshift to local time derivative.
external_gate_policy.distance_duality: A candidate must later pass a joint photon-transfer/opacity likelihood; no fixed numerical prior is invented here.
external_gate_policy.light_curve_escalation: No escalation while the released-covariance supernova gate fails.
external_gate_policy.supernova_gate: abs(Delta BIC versus flat Lambda-CDM) <= 2 using released covariance and the same nuisance structure
external_gate_policy.time_dilation_gate: predicted b within two combined standard deviations of DES b=1.003
